email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Transportation Support Staff bij Synergie Mechelen. Mijn ervaring in logistiek bij Katoen Natie en mijn technische achtergrond in data-analyse en procesoptimalisatie sluiten goed aan bij deze rol.

Bij Katoen Natie werkte ik in een hoogvolume, snel veranderende logistieke omgeving, waar ik nauwkeurigheid en efficiëntie hoog hield. Daarnaast heb ik via mijn digitale marketingwerk bij Episto ervaring met data-analyse (Google Analytics, SEMrush) en het oplossen van operationele problemen. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb een B1-niveau Nederlands, met dagelijkse praktijk.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn logistieke ervaring en analytische vaardigheden in te zetten voor het ondersteunen van het 'Last mile'-team en het opbouwen van sterke relaties met Europese dealers.

Ik kijk uit naar een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Transportation Support Staff position at Synergie Mechelen. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie and my technical background in data analysis and process optimization align well with this role.

At Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment, maintaining accuracy and efficiency. Additionally, through my digital marketing work at Episto, I have experience with data analysis (Google Analytics, SEMrush) and solving operational issues. I speak fluent English and have B1 Dutch, with daily practice.

I am motivated to use my logistics experience and analytical skills to support the 'Last mile' team and build strong relationships with European dealers.

I look forward to speaking with you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Transportation Support Staff bij Synergie Mechelen. Uw oproep voor een teamspeler met logistieke ervaring en vloeiend Engels sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

Mijn logistieke ervaring deed ik op bij Katoen Natie in Antwerpen, waar ik in een hoogvolume magazijn werkte. Ik leerde er processen stroomlijnen, nauwkeurig werken onder tijdsdruk en operationele problemen snel oplossen. Deze ervaring, gecombineerd met mijn analytische vaardigheden, stelt mij in staat om de 'Last mile'-leveringen aan Europese dealers effectief te ondersteunen.

Bij Episto, als junior digital marketer, gebruik ik dagelijks data-analyse tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Excel om processen te monitoren en te optimaliseren. Deze vaardigheden zijn direct toepasbaar op het ondersteunen van zee- en grondvrachtprocessen en het waarborgen van accurate data. Ook heb ik ervaring met Salesforce via eerdere projecten.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en heb een B1-niveau Nederlands, dat ik actief verbeter. Mijn Turkse achtergrond en ervaring in internationale omgevingen maken mij cultureel flexibel.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is de combinatie van operationele ondersteuning, relatiebeheer en groeimogelijkheden. Ik ben leergierig, probleemoplossend en klaar om bij te dragen aan het team.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Transportation Support Staff position at Synergie Mechelen. Your call for a team player with logistics experience and fluent English perfectly matches my profile.

I gained my logistics experience at Katoen Natie in Antwerp, working in a high-volume warehouse. I learned to streamline processes, work accurately under time pressure, and quickly resolve operational issues. This experience, combined with my analytical skills, enables me to effectively support 'Last mile' deliveries to European dealers.

At Episto, as a junior digital marketer, I daily use data analysis tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Excel to monitor and optimize processes. These skills are directly applicable to supporting ocean and ground freight processes and ensuring accurate data. I also have experience with Salesforce through previous projects.

I speak fluent English and have B1 Dutch, which I am actively improving. My Turkish background and experience in international environments make me culturally flexible.

What appeals to me in this role is the combination of operational support, relationship management, and growth opportunities. I am eager to learn, a problem solver, and ready to contribute to the team.

I hope to further explain my motivation and experience in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
1 year logistics experience at Katoen Natie in high-volume warehouse
Proficient in English (fluent) and Dutch (B1, improving)
Strong analytical skills with Excel, Google Analytics, SEMrush
Experience with Salesforce (added value)
Problem-solving mindset with quick adaptation to new tools
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and hands-on logistics experience in a high-volume warehouse environment. At Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in fast-paced logistics operations. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across data analysis, process optimization, and problem-solving; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Logistics & operations: warehouse operations, process optimization, accuracy under pressure, problem-solving
- Data & analysis: Excel, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console, Google Ads
- CRM & tools: Salesforce (basic knowledge)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
